chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-642 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 5383/2023 03-11-2023 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. ***** Hakim Ali (respondent No.2) present in person submits that he has compromised with the applicant and does not intend to file any FIR against him. Learned counsel holding brief on behalf of applicant’s counsel is satisfied and under instructions does not press this application, which is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
